prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is S-301 Rigging configuration within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.3 Rigging & Machinery Moving. The observed field condition is: slings over unprotected edges. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ASME B30, OSHA 1926.251.
title: T1 S-301 Code/spec compliance
